24.reason: root is not updated, remains NULL, causing runtime error when printleaf accesses root->lchild.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  The return value of insert is not assigned to root, so root remains NULL after the first call, causing a segmentation fault when printleaf tries to access root->lchild.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The return value of insert is not assigned to root, so the tree is never built beyond the first node. This causes root to remain NULL when n >= 1, leading to a runtime error (null pointer dereference) in printleaf.]
